7 // -*- C++ -*-
8 #ifndef ARCTEMREFACTORING_ARCTEMUTILS_OUTPUTFORMATTING_MULTICOLUMN_H
9 #define ARCTEMREFACTORING_ARCTEMUTILS_OUTPUTFORMATTING_MULTICOLUMN_H
10 /* Author : desrozis at Mon Jan 13 09:37:35 2014
11  * Generated by createNew
12  */
13 
14 #include "ArcGeoSim/Utils/OutputFormatting/Indentation.h"
15 
16 #include <arcane/utils/String.h>
17 #include <arcane/utils/StringBuilder.h>
18 
19 namespace OutputFormatting {
20 
21  class MultiColumn
22  {
23  public:
24 
25  MultiColumn(int number_of_columns, char indentation)
26  : m_number_of_columns(number_of_columns)
27  , m_indentation(indentation) {}
28 
29  MultiColumn& operator<<(const char* c)
30  {
31  return operator<<(std::string(c));
32  }
33 
34  MultiColumn& operator<<(const std::string& s)
35  {
36  Arcane::StringBuilder sb(m_value);
37  sb += s;
38  m_value = sb.toString();
39  return *this;
40  }
41 
42  template <typename T>
43  MultiColumn& operator<<(const T& t)
44  {
45  std::stringstream ss;
46  ss << t;
47  return operator<<(ss.str());
48  }
49 
50 
51  Arcane::Integer numberOfColumns() const { return m_number_of_columns; }
52 
53  const Arcane::String& value() const { return m_value; }
54 
55  const Indentation& indentation() const { return m_indentation; }
56 
57  private:
58 
59  Arcane::Integer m_number_of_columns;
60 
61  Arcane::String m_value;
62 
63  Indentation m_indentation;
64  };
65 
66 }
67 
68 #endif /* ARCTEMREFACTORING_ARCTEMUTILS_OUTPUTFORMATTING_MULTICOLUMN_H */
